hero.title: Your dream stay, easy and secure
hero.subtitle: Discover your next refuge in Cartagena. Unique apartments and country houses designed to create unforgettable experiences.
hero.description: Welcome to your perfect getaway where every moment becomes a special memory!

company.name: Mundo Vacacional CK
company.description: Discover the magic of Cartagena with our exclusive apartments, country houses with pool and premium transport services

experience.title: Discover the unique experience of Mundo Vacacional CK. Our apartments and country houses with pool offer you the comfort of home with the excitement of perfect vacations in Cartagena. Each space is designed to create unforgettable moments with spectacular views and environments that combine elegance and warmth.
experience.transport: Our van rental service allows you to explore Cartagena with total freedom. From colonial walls to paradisiacal beaches, travel in style and discover the most beautiful landscapes of the Colombian Caribbean. With us you invest in unforgettable experiences.

transport.title: Premium Transport Tailored for You
transport.subtitle: Travel with comfort and style throughout Cartagena
transport.description: Enjoy an exclusive, comfortable and safe transport service for each of your journeys. We have modern vehicles, with air conditioning and all the amenities so that your experience is pleasant from the first moment.

services.airport: Transfers to and from the airport.
services.private: Private transport for tours in Cartagena and surroundings.
services.national: Personalized national trips, so you reach your destination in total tranquility.

transport.commitment: Our commitment is to provide you with punctuality, comfort and the best attention on every trip.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your Best Option in Cartagena
about.description: At MundovacacionalCk we believe that the best experiences begin with a cozy place to rest. We specialize in offering tourist apartments in the city of Cartagena, designed to provide comfort, cleanliness and close attention.
about.purpose: Our purpose is for each guest to enjoy unforgettable vacations on the coast, combining hospitality, tranquility and spaces equipped to feel at home.
about.commitment: We put our heart into every detail: from the warmth in service to the preparation of each apartment, because we know that traveling is more than staying: it's living unique and special moments.
